description_long: This is a classic twin-bell alarm clock with a round, metallic body and two prominent black bells on top, separated by a small hammer. The clock face is white with black Roman numerals and two black hands, encased in a shiny, slightly reflective frame. The legs and back are also metallic, with a subtle golden tint visible along the sides. The back of the clock features wind-up mechanisms and adjustment knobs, typical of mechanical alarm clocks. The overall design is robust and slightly retro, with a glossy finish that highlights its metallic construction. This type of clock is often found on bedside tables or desks, serving both decorative and functional purposes.
description: A classic twin-bell alarm clock with a round white face, black Roman numerals, and a shiny metallic body with black bells and legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white clock face with black Roman numerals, two black hands, and the twin black bells on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the metallic golden side of the clock body and the profile of the bells and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid black back, wind-up mechanisms, and adjustment knobs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the metallic golden side and the profile of the bells and legs from the other direction.
attribute_face_design: Round white face with black Roman numerals, a dotted minute track, and two black hands, encased in a metallic frame.
